heaviest_rainfall.status: Record-breaking rain fell on 09 November 2025 with a total accumulation of 47.89mm over 144.8 hours and falling at a rate of 24.6mm per hour at times.

heaviest_rainrate.status: The rain rate reached 34.3mm per hour on 02 September 2025, and resulted in 21.19mm of rain over 15.0 hours.  This is the highest rate recorded by our weather station.

longest_rain.status: On 09 November 2025, the rain lasted for 144.8 hours, which is the longest time recorded by our database.  47.89mm accumulated and it fell at 24.6mm per hour at times.

most_lightning.status: Since 11 April 2025, the day with the most lightning strikes is 07 September 2025 when 23 were seen.

storm.status: There are no active storms in the area.  The previous storm started on 31 December 2025 and lasted 1 day.

top_10_dry.status: We are in the midst of one of the longest dry periods recorded.  This dry period is ranked 4th since records began in 23 September 2024.  The current stretch started on 23 December 2025 and has lasted 10 days.  The longest dry period started on 24 April 2025 and lasted for 19 days.

top_10_rainy.status: The longest rainy period started on 26 November 2025 and lasted for 14 days.

cold_snaps.status: There is no cold snap at the moment.  This year has experienced 0 cold snaps, with an average of 3.7 per year.

extreme.status: The largest temperature difference recorded was 26.7°C on 29 April 2025.  On that date the temperature reached 27.1°C and fell to 0.4°C.

heatwaves.status: There is no heatwaves at the moment.  This year has experienced 0 heatwavess, with an average of 1.9 per year.

tropical.status: The previous tropical night was on 18 July 2025, with only 62 in total since 1973.

average.status: The current average daily wind direction is southerly (197°).  In the UK, a southerly wind usually brings milder, moist air from the Atlantic.

gusts.status: The highest wind gust ever seen is 93.7 mph on 13 October 2012.

run.status: The record wind run remains at 1737 miles from 21 October 2012.

speed.status: The top recorded wind speed is 93.7 mph on 13 October 2012.

top_10_windy.status: The longest windy period started on 11 October 2012 and lasted for 21 days.

summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the outside temperature (up 2.5°C) and feels like temperature (up 2.4°C) and cooler for the inside temperature (down 1.9°C).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in cloud levels (up 194 m) and pressure (up 13 mbar).

cloud levels.description:
Today’s average cloud levels is 194.2m lower than yesterday, 0.4m lower than the past month.

Yesterday, cloud levels hit a low of 698m and a high of 1215m, averaging 795.6m; the past week and month reported somewhat higher averages.
cloud levels.summary: Low clouds are expected, possibly some fog or persistent clouds.

summary.summary: Inside; cold temperatures are forecasted. Outside; bitterly cold temperatures are expected. Also, winds will be practically absent. Low clouds are expected, possibly some fog or persistent clouds and it’s dim outside. The weather will likely remain the same.

washing.phrase: It is nighttime; if you have washing out then bring it in as it will probably get damper overnight.
